message.content:
@startuml
package "Repository" as R {
    class SprintRepository {
        method findCurrentSprintInProject(String projectID)
    }
    class SprintBacklogItemRepository {
        method findSprintBacklogItemsInSprint(String projID, String sprintID)
    }
    class TaskRepository {
        method findAllByContainerID(SprintBacklogItemID sbilID)
    }
}

package "Domain" as D {
    class Task {
        attribute taskID : TaskID
        attribute taskContainerID : TaskContainerID
        attribute status : TaskStatus
        attribute percentageOfExecution : Percentage
        attribute taskDescription : TaskDescription

        method getTaskID()
        method getTaskContID()
        method getStatus()
        method getPercentageOfExecution()
    }
    class SprintBacklogItemID {
        attribute sbilID : UUID
        method getId()
    }
}

package "DTO" as T {
    class TaskDTO {
        attribute taskID : String
        attribute taskContainerID : String
        attribute status : String
        attribute percentageOfExecution : int

        method setTaskID()
        method setTaskContainerID()
        method setStatus()
        method setPercentageOfExecution()
    }
}

package "Service" as S {
    class TaskService {
        method getStatusOfActivities(String projectID)
        method getCurrentSprintID(projectID)
        method getSbIDs(projectID, sprintID)
        method getTasks(sbilIDs)
    }
}

package "Controller" as C {
    class TaskController {
        method getStatusOfActivitiesInProject(String projectID)
    }
    class TaskUI {
    }
}

package "Mapper" as M {
    class TaskMapper {
        method statusListToDTO(List<Task> tasks)
        method statusToDTO(Task task)
    }
}

TaskService "uses" SprintRepository
TaskService "uses" SprintBacklogItemRepository
TaskService "uses" TaskRepository
TaskController "uses" TaskUI
TaskController "uses" TaskMapper
TaskMapper "uses" TaskContainerID
TaskContainerID "uses" Task
TaskContainerID "uses" SprintBacklogItemID

TaskUI "uses" TaskController
TaskController "uses" TaskService
TaskService "uses" Task
TaskService "uses" TaskDTO
TaskDTO "uses" Task
TaskDTO "uses" SprintBacklogItemID
